falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates a confirmed market top, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 4100 for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the pattern similarity to the 2024 August bottom, proving the current call incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: 200-day moving average crosses above the price action
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a new bullish trend phase, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict wrong.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
